items.name: Fluree AI
items.description: Give every AI agent trusted context. Fluree AI gives every app and AI agent the same trusted context from your company data. Ask questions and get cited, verifiable answers from one live data layer, with permissions checked on every request. Instead of rebuilding prompts or relying on RAG guesses, Fluree queries structured data directly and connects to MCP-ready agents, dashboards, and apps in minutes.

raw_data.tagline: Give every AI agent trusted context

items.name: Pushary
items.description: Approve AI requests from your lock screen. One command connects your AI agents to your lock screen. When Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Hermes, or Claude Cowork stops to ask, you tap yes from your phone and the run keeps moving. New in this launch: native iPhone and Android apps. Pairing is a QR code you scan from the terminal, no key to paste. Per-tool policies auto-approve the safe reads. Every decision lands in an audit trail.

raw_data.tagline: Approve AI requests from your lock screen

items.name: YC has it
items.description: Describe your problem, get the YC startup that solves it . Describe your problem in plain English. ychasit searches 4,000+ active YC companies and finds the startups that solve it, with reasoning, pricing, and integrations. 100% Free forever. No login. No signup.

raw_data.tagline: Describe your problem, get the YC startup that solves it

items.name: HarnessRouter
items.description: Bring the world's best AI agents into your app, with one API. Building an AI agent backend yourself takes months: sandboxes, orchestration, retries, cost controls. HarnessRouter runs it for you. One API in, finished work out: code, files, videos, games. Trusted by top medical research institutions, leading healthcare companies, and cutting-edge startups in multiple domains.

raw_data.tagline: Bring the world's best AI agents into your app, with one API

items.name: Freesolo Flash
items.description: Full-Stack Platform for Training Small Language Models. Freesolo helps enterprise teams turn generic model capability into AI features that belong in the product. We make reinforcement learning a commodity so any team can train a small, specialized model for their task.

raw_data.tagline: Full-Stack Platform for Training Small Language Models

items.name: Prosed
items.description: The AI book service that shows its work. Most AI book services work like a black box. Your content goes in, a manuscript comes out, and you hope it sounds like you. We thought creators deserved more than hope. The Source Map color-codes every paragraph in your manuscript: your original words from newsletters, podcasts, and posts alongside the connective tissue Prosed added to bridge your ideas together. Today, over 90% of each book we assembled is the creator's own words. Now you can see that for yourself.

raw_data.tagline: The AI book service that shows its work

items.name: Reach
items.description: The operating system to win AI search.. Reach is the operating system to win AI search. Your marketing team and AI agents work in one place, doing the work that actually gets you recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google in the prompts that matter for your buyer journey. From finding the demand, to executing content, mentions and community, to measuring and attributing the revenue.

raw_data.tagline: The operating system to win AI search.

items.name: OpenWorker
items.description: Local-first desktop agent for everyday work. OpenWorker is an AI agent that runs on your own computer, works in your everyday tools, and turns what you ask into finished deliverables — checking in before anything important. Free, open source, bring your own model.

raw_data.tagline: Local-first desktop agent for everyday work

items.name: Buska
items.description: Turn social media buying signals into pipeline. Buska monitors Twitter, Reddit, LinkedIn and 30+ platforms for buying signals in real time. Every mention is AI-scored from 0 to 100 based on buying intent and matched to your ICP. You only see the leads worth your time. When a hot lead surfaces, Reply Studio generates a contextual reply in seconds. Export directly to HubSpot, Salesforce, Lemlist, or any tool via webhook. 2,000+ sales and growth teams. 7-day free trial, no credit card.

raw_data.tagline: Turn social media buying signals into pipeline

items.name: AngelList Link
items.description: MCP for GPs: turn your fund into something you can talk to. AngelList Link is an MCP server for GPs to turn your fund into something you can talk to. One source of truth. Verified answers. Daily financials. Queryable from Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool you already work from. Ask a question about your own fund — capital call status, LP holdings across vehicles, a valuation update — and get an answer instantly. This is agentic fund management: the system of record for more than 25,000 funds and SPVs, queryable from any AI tool.

raw_data.tagline: MCP for GPs: turn your fund into something you can talk to

items.name: base
items.description: The system of intelligence for lean founding teams. Base gives lean founding teams the operating layer of a much larger company. It is a command interface and system of intelligence, five layers: Setup, Orchestration, Company Brain, Memory, Intelligence. Instruct it in natural language to pull financial reports or draft investor updates, and it executes across your connected stack, getting sharper the longer you use it. Vibe coding got you to a product. Base gets you to a business.

raw_data.tagline: The system of intelligence for lean founding teams

items.name: Handler
items.description: Spy the outlier TikToks. Dupe the winners for your app.. Every app founder can ship fast but has no idea what to post on TikTok. So they doomscroll for hours or burn $25-$200 per UGC video hoping something sticks. Handler fixes the "what do I post" problem. It scans TikTok for the outlier videos already going viral in your niche - scored not by raw views but by Outlier score and Pull Score). Then it hands you a shoot-ready dupe kit: hook, script, and direction to remake the winning pattern for your app. Built by the team behind Flamme (acquired) 🔥

raw_data.tagline: Spy the outlier TikToks. Dupe the winners for your app.

items.name: Privent 2.0
items.description: Runtime Data Control for n8n Workflows. AI agents send raw data to LLMs on every run: emails, records, API keys, secrets. n8n's own Guardrails node can redact that, but redaction is permanent, the data never comes back. Privent tokenizes PII and secrets before they reach the LLM, then reverses it safely at a trusted sink. Official n8n Integration Partner, live today. Local mode runs fully offline. Built for teams running agent workflows in production who cannot afford a single leaked record.

raw_data.tagline: Runtime Data Control for n8n Workflows

items.name: Matthew Slack Perth Executive Leadership
items.description: Executive Leadership Focused on Growth and Innovation. Matthew Slack Perth combines commercial expertise with executive leadership to help organisations achieve operational excellence and long-term success. His background across government, mining, healthcare, infrastructure, technology, and commercial enterprise enables him to develop practical strategies that improve governance, strengthen business performance, and support sustainable organisational development.

raw_data.tagline: Executive Leadership Focused on Growth and Innovation

items.name: WrapperExits
items.description: What AI wrappers actually sell for. A paid database of 135 real AI micro-SaaS (“AI wrapper”) exits: sale price, MRR, ARR multiple, time-to-exit and channel. Every deal has a source and a confidence level. Know what your wrapper is worth before you build or sell. One-time, no subscription.

raw_data.tagline: What AI wrappers actually sell for

items.name: WaxLab
items.description: All tools in one place for candlemakers and soapmakers. . Upload your SDS, IFRA and allergen documentation and WaxLab generates your candle's CLP label at any concentration. Label designer, fragrance load calculators and a costed recipe book. 30 days free, no credit card.

raw_data.tagline: All tools in one place for candlemakers and soapmakers.

items.name: Muster
items.description: The native cockpit for AI coding agents. Muster is the native cockpit for AI coding agents on real work. Each task runs in its own isolated git worktree, so agents never collide with your checkout or each other. They reach your databases through MCP with exactly the permissions you set, and you review hunks and open the PR — with full SSH, a five-engine DB studio, and Linear/Jira/GitHub imports in the same app. Offline-first: code and credentials never leave your machine. $39 one-time per device. macOS, Linux, Windows.

raw_data.tagline: The native cockpit for AI coding agents

items.name: BeaconFind
items.description: Find any file by what's inside it. Private, on-device AI.. BeaconFind is an AI file search app for Windows, press Ctrl+K to find files on your PC by meaning, not just filename. 100% private & offline. Free 14-day trial.

raw_data.tagline: Find any file by what's inside it. Private, on-device AI.

items.name: Bottalk
items.description: Let Claude and ChatGPT talk to each other in your browser. Bottalk is a free browser extension (Chrome/Edge) that connects two tabs — claude.ai and chatgpt.com — and lets the two AIs discuss any topic you choose. Set who starts, rounds and reply length, in English or German. Runs locally with your own logins. Free.

raw_data.tagline: Let Claude and ChatGPT talk to each other in your browser

items.name: depgaze
items.description: Dependency execution intelligence. depgaze is a CLI based developer tool for Linux and Windows that leverage OS level fingerprinting to audit and explain using an LLM the dependencies flowing through your CI pipeline and inner dev loop — catching malicious, abandoned, and risky packages before they reach your machine. It currently supports npm, PyPi, the ability to be instrumented by AI agents via agent skill and to be hosted on your own infrastructure for maximum privacy.

raw_data.tagline: Dependency execution intelligence

items.name: Mimette
items.description: The AI stylist who gets your style and vibe, not your closet. Meet Mimette 👗✨ — your cool, style-aware (French) AI personal stylist who can turn a vague intent – a vibe or an occasion combined with your own style preferences, into a complete, explainable and budget-aligned look in under minutes. She's not another closet app. She's not another colour analysis tool. Tell her your style and the "vibe" you're currently in. In seconds, she hands you a full look that feels like you.

raw_data.tagline: The AI stylist who gets your style and vibe, not your closet

items.name: World Monitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard on a live 3D map. Headlines are the lag. World Monitor streams raw global signals—ships, jets, sirens, subsea cables, and markets—onto one live 3D map with AI flagging when they converge into critical events. • 56 Live Layers: AIS shipping, flight tracking, GPS jamming, power grids. • Corroborated Alerts: AI fires only when independent sources agree. • Instability Index: Instant dossiers & AI briefs for 196 countries. • Built for AI: 39-tool MCP server & REST API for agents.

raw_data.tagline: Real-time global intelligence dashboard on a live 3D map

items.name: Niyojan
items.description: Your events run in WhatsApp. Niyojan lets nothing slip past.. It's 11pm before the wedding and the DJ just texted "kal nahi kar paunga," buried under 40 unread messages and three unlogged advances. Niyojan reads your event WhatsApp groups and keeps score. "Sharma photography ka 25k advance" becomes a logged payment. "Priya will send the layout kal" becomes a task with an owner. A vendor backing out jumps to the top, not message 38. Nobody installs an app. Nobody types anything twice. Also runs Ganesh mandal accounts: vargani, expenses, cash and bank.

raw_data.tagline: Your events run in WhatsApp. Niyojan lets nothing slip past.

items.name: Cobalt
items.description: The world's first Agentic Accelerator browser. Meet Cobalt, the world’s first Agentic Accelerator browser that combines AI models, tools, and secure workspace for faster, frictionless browsing.

raw_data.tagline: The world's first Agentic Accelerator browser

items.name: Memorist
items.description: An auditable, local-first memory engine for Open WebUI. Long-running LLM work loses continuity: decisions, corrections, and constraints evaporate between sessions. Most fixes summarize old chats into a hidden prompt — invisible, unauditable, easy to poison. Memorist takes a different position: raw messages are evidence, not memory. Every message is preserved unchanged in a local ledger. Deterministic sentence segmentation produces units with exact character offsets, so every memory claim traces back to the exact words that produced it.

raw_data.tagline: An auditable, local-first memory engine for Open WebUI

items.name: OpenBox
items.description: Runtime governance for AI agents, wherever they run. OpenBox helps teams keep AI agents controlled, compliant, and auditable while they operate. Enforce policies before actions execute, require human approval for sensitive operations, and maintain verifiable audit trails of every decision. Now integrated with 8+ frameworks and infrastructure platforms. OpenBox brings one consistent governance layer across the frameworks you already used to build and run production AI agents.

raw_data.tagline: Runtime governance for AI agents, wherever they run

items.name: Watchdog
items.description: Local control plane for subagents and agent execution graphs. Subagents, agentic loops and execution graphs make parallel work possible, but they also make it easy to lose track of what each agent is currently doing, which model and reasoning effort it used, amount of tokens being consumed, and other useful info. Watchdog gives you one live view of what your coding agents are doing, what they cost and how they relate to each other. Stop, steer and control your all agents from one place. Watchdog has 3 surfaces- Yard (pixel art UI), Operator, and a TUI.

raw_data.tagline: Local control plane for subagents and agent execution graphs

items.name: HeliosDB-Nano
items.description: Nano database with Vectors, Data Branching & Time‑Travel. HeliosDB-Nano is a single 32MB embedded SQL database with native PostgreSQL & MySQL wire‑protocol compatibility, built‑in vector search (HNSW + PQ), full‑text search, git‑like branching, and time‑travel queries. It runs anywhere — local‑first apps, edge devices, AI agents, or serverless. No migrations, no drivers to rewrite. Use psql, mysql, REST, or any ORM — everything just works.

raw_data.tagline: Nano database with Vectors, Data Branching & Time‑Travel

items.name: Experts
items.description: Build AI experts from the sources you trust.. Create AI experts from YouTube videos, Instagram Reels, webpages, and notes, then ask questions grounded in the knowledge you trust.

raw_data.tagline: Build AI experts from the sources you trust.

items.name: Rondine
items.description: Run the right local LLM for your hardware. Rondine is an open-source control plane for local LLMs. It detects RAM and VRAM, recommends models that fit, applies hardware-tuned settings, downloads weights, and starts an OpenAI-compatible server. It supports Apple Silicon, NVIDIA GPUs, and DGX Spark through llama.cpp, MLX-LM, and vLLM. Instead of creating another inference engine, Rondine coordinates proven runtimes and shows every launch plan before execution.

raw_data.tagline: Run the right local LLM for your hardware
